## PART A: IMPLEMENTATION PLAN

### Agent Analysis Summary
After parsing the SSOT, agents identified:
- **4 cost modules** (AI API, Compute, Storage, Bandwidth)
- **15 hosting configurations** across 7 providers
- **9 AI model configurations** across 4 providers
- **2 currency outputs** (USD primary, KZT secondary)

### Task Breakdown

| ID | Task | Hours |
|---|---|---|
| T-001 | Vite + React scaffold | 0.5h |
| T-002 | `pricing.config.js` — all providers + models | 1h |
| T-003 | `calculator.js` — all 4 cost functions | 2h |
| T-004 | Unit tests for all math | 2h |
| T-005 | `InputForm` component (sliders + dropdowns) | 2h |
| T-006 | `CostCard` component (per-provider result) | 1h |
| T-007 | `ComparisonChart` (Chart.js bar chart) | 1.5h |
| T-008 | `BreakdownDonut` chart | 1h |
| T-009 | CSV export function | 0.5h |
| T-010 | Dark theme CSS + responsive layout | 2h |
| T-011 | Firebase init + deploy | 0.5h |

## PART B: TEST SPECIFICATIONS

### TEST-AI-001: Claude Haiku 4.5 — 1K messages/day
```
Input:  daily=1000, tokens_in=500, tokens_out=300
Calc:   monthly = 30,000
        cost_in  = 30,000 × 500 / 1M × $0.80  = $0.012
        cost_out = 30,000 × 300 / 1M × $4.00  = $0.036
Expected: cost_ai = $0.048 ✓
```

### TEST-AI-002: Gemini 2.5 Pro — 10K messages/day
```
Input:  daily=10000, tokens_in=1000, tokens_out=500
Calc:   monthly = 300,000
        cost_in  = 300,000 × 1000 / 1M × $1.25 = $0.375
        cost_out = 300,000 × 500  / 1M × $10.00 = $1.50
Expected: cost_ai = $1.875 ✓
```

### TEST-AI-003: Free model (Raptor mini / GPT-4.1o)
```
Input:  any usage, model = raptor-mini
Expected: cost_ai = $0.00 ✓
```

### TEST-COMPUTE-001: Firebase Spark (free)
```
Input:  daily=1000, exec_ms=800, memory=0.25GB
Calc:   invocations = 60,000 (< 2M free)
        gb_seconds  = 12,000 (< 400K free)
Expected: cost_compute = $0.00 ✓
```

### TEST-COMPUTE-002: Digital Ocean $4 Droplet
```
Input:  provider = digitalocean-basic-1gb
Expected: cost_compute = $4.00 (flat) ✓
```

### TEST-COMPUTE-003: AWS EC2 t3.micro
```
Input:  provider = aws-ec2-t3micro
Expected: cost_compute = $7.59 (flat) ✓
```

### TEST-COMPUTE-004: PS Cloud KZ
```
Input:  provider = pscloud-standard
Expected: cost_compute = $7.80 (flat), KZT = 3,510 ₸ ✓
```

### TEST-STORAGE-001: Within free tier
```
Input:  daily=500, users=100, provider=firebase
Calc:   stored_gb ≈ 0.000043 GB (< 1 GB free)
Expected: cost_storage = $0.00 ✓
```

### TEST-STORAGE-002: AWS S3 beyond free
```
Input:  stored_gb = 50 GB, provider=aws
Calc:   billable = 50 - 5 = 45 GB
Expected: cost_storage = 45 × $0.023 = $1.035 ✓
```

### TEST-BW-001: Within free tier (Firebase)
```
Input:  daily=1000, users=200
Calc:   total_egress ≈ 0.40 GB (< 10 GB free)
Expected: cost_bandwidth = $0.00 ✓
```

### TEST-BW-002: Digital Ocean (1TB included)
```
Input:  any usage < 1024 GB
Expected: cost_bandwidth = $0.00 ✓
```

### TEST-EDGE-001: Zero messages
```
Input:  daily_messages = 0
Expected: Error thrown "Messages must be > 0" ✓
```

### TEST-EDGE-002: KZT conversion
```
Input:  total_usd = $10.00
Expected: kzt = 10 × 450 = 4,500 ₸ ✓
```

### TEST-EDGE-003: Max scale no crash
```
Input:  daily = 10,000,000, model = gpt4o, provider = aws-lambda
Expected: returns valid number in < 50ms, no crash ✓
```
